Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk

Class AccountTransfers

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.AccountTransfers
All Implemented Interfaces:
SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallAccountTransfersAcceptTransfer, SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallAccountTransfersCreateTransfer, SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallAccountTransfersGetTransfer, SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallAccountTransfersListTransfers, SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallAccountTransfersRejectTransfer

    • createTransfer

      public AccountTransfersCreateTransferResponse createTransfer(String correspondentId, String accountId, TransferCreate transferCreate) throws Exception
      Create Transfer Creates a transfer
      Parameters:
      correspondentId - The correspondent id.
      accountId - The account id.
      transferCreate - An account transfer which contains the receiving and delivering party information, assets being transferred, NSCC status information, etc.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • createTransfer

      public AccountTransfersCreateTransferResponse createTransfer(String correspondentId, String accountId, Optional<String> requestId, TransferCreate transferCreate) throws Exception
      Create Transfer Creates a transfer
      Specified by:
      createTransfer in interface SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallAccountTransfersCreateTransfer
      Parameters:
      correspondentId - The correspondent id.
      accountId - The account id.
      requestId - A client-specified ID for the account transfer; no specific pattern is imposed. This field is used for idempotency to ensure that repeated requests with the same ID do not result in duplicate transfers.
      transferCreate - An account transfer which contains the receiving and delivering party information, assets being transferred, NSCC status information, etc.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • acceptTransfer

      public AccountTransfersAcceptTransferRequestBuilder acceptTransfer()
      Accept Transfer Accept one side (incoming/outgoing) of an internal Ascend transfer. When both the incoming side and outgoing side of the transfer have been accepted then bookkeeping is done immediately. If neither, or only one side of a transfer is accepted, then both sides of the internal perform bookkeeping one full settlement day after they went into the bookkeeping queue.
      Returns:
      The call builder

    • acceptTransfer

      public AccountTransfersAcceptTransferResponse acceptTransfer(String correspondentId, String accountId, String transferId, AcceptTransferRequestCreate acceptTransferRequestCreate) throws Exception
      Accept Transfer Accept one side (incoming/outgoing) of an internal Ascend transfer. When both the incoming side and outgoing side of the transfer have been accepted then bookkeeping is done immediately. If neither, or only one side of a transfer is accepted, then both sides of the internal perform bookkeeping one full settlement day after they went into the bookkeeping queue.
      Specified by:
      acceptTransfer in interface SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallAccountTransfersAcceptTransfer
      Parameters:
      correspondentId - The correspondent id.
      accountId - The account id.
      transferId - The transfer id.
      acceptTransferRequestCreate - Request to accept internal Ascend transfers.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • rejectTransfer

      public AccountTransfersRejectTransferRequestBuilder rejectTransfer()
      Reject Transfer Reject one side (incoming/outgoing) of an internal Ascend transfer. Rejecting one side automatically moves the contra side of the transfer to be rejected as well.
      Returns:
      The call builder

    • rejectTransfer

      public AccountTransfersRejectTransferResponse rejectTransfer(String correspondentId, String accountId, String transferId, RejectTransferRequestCreate rejectTransferRequestCreate) throws Exception
      Reject Transfer Reject one side (incoming/outgoing) of an internal Ascend transfer. Rejecting one side automatically moves the contra side of the transfer to be rejected as well.
      Specified by:
      rejectTransfer in interface SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallAccountTransfersRejectTransfer
      Parameters:
      correspondentId - The correspondent id.
      accountId - The account id.
      transferId - The transfer id.
      rejectTransferRequestCreate - Request to reject internal Ascend transfers.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails
